user_prompt:
Create a modern blog website with:
1. Homepage with featured posts grid and hero section
2. Individual post pages with reading time and progress indicator
3. Advanced search with autocomplete and tag filtering
4. Categories and tags system with cloud visualization
5. Newsletter integration with Mailchimp/ConvertKit
6. Author profile pages with social links
7. Related posts recommendation engine
8. Table of contents with smooth scroll highlighting
9. Syntax highlighting for code snippets (Prism.js)
10. Image lightbox gallery for post images
11. Share buttons with dynamic URL and meta tags
12. Comments system with nested replies
13. SEO optimized with JSON-LD structured data
14. Mobile-first responsive design
15. PWA capabilities for offline reading

features: Homepage with featured posts grid and hero section
Individual post pages with reading time and progress indicator
Advanced search with autocomplete and tag filtering
Categories and tags system with cloud visualization
Author profile pages with social links
Table of contents with smooth scroll highlighting
Image lightbox gallery for post images
Share buttons with dynamic URL and meta tags
SEO optimized with JSON-LD structured data
1_conversation.summary: A modern, responsive blog platform with advanced search, SEO optimization, and interactive features for content creators to engage readers.
must_have_features: Homepage with featured posts grid and hero section
Individual post pages with reading time and progress indicator
Advanced search with autocomplete and tag filtering
Categories and tags system with cloud visualization
Author profile pages with social links
Table of contents with smooth scroll highlighting
Image lightbox gallery for post images
Share buttons with dynamic URL and meta tags
SEO optimized with JSON-LD structured data

functional_requirements: Homepage with featured posts grid and hero section
Individual post pages with reading time and progress indicator
Advanced search with autocomplete and tag filtering
Categories and tags system with cloud visualization
Author profile pages with social links
Table of contents with smooth scroll highlighting
Image lightbox gallery for post images
Share buttons with dynamic URL and meta tags
SEO optimized with JSON-LD structured data
non_functional_requirements: Performance: Critical resource load time ≤ 2 seconds (desktop) and ≤ 3 seconds (mobile) as per Lighthouse standards
Accessibility: WCAG 2.1 AA compliance for screen readers and keyboard navigation
Offline capability: PWA service worker to cache articles for offline viewing
Cross-browser compatibility: Support for Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge (latest versions)
ui_ux_requirements: Minimalist design with ample whitespace and consistent typography (e.g., sans-serif fonts)
Touch-friendly elements: 48x48px interactive targets for mobile
Visual feedback: Subtle hover/active states and loading indicators
Intuitive navigation: Clear hierarchy with consistent menu placement
technical_requirements: Prism.js implementation for syntax highlighting with theme support
Mailchimp/ConvertKit API integration for subscription management
Service worker configuration for PWA offline caching (cache-first strategy)
JSON-LD schema generation for articles and pages
Lazy loading for images/videos (Intersection Observer API)
Mobile-first CSS framework (e.g., Tailwind CSS) for responsive layout

development_tasks: Create HTML structure with responsive layout
Implement CSS for global styling and component-specific styles
Develop JavaScript for dynamic page interactions
Add search functionality with debounce and filtering
Implement category cloud with dynamic font-size scaling
Build related posts feature using API data
Develop share buttons with social media integration
Configure data structure for posts and authors
Add favicon and optimize for SEO
Create 404 error page with helpful guidance
Generate robots.txt and sitemap.xml for search engines
Implement mobile responsiveness across all components
Test and debug for cross-browser compatibility
